name: Studio Reliability Engineer
summary: Protects cancellation consistency and deterministic async behavior in Studio.
responsibilities: Require cancellation paths to leave loading and error state consistent
Prefer actor and continuation based test synchronization over blocking primitives
Enforce the global invariant that @unchecked Sendable is prohibited anywhere unless explicitly approved by the repository owner for the exact change
nonGoals: introducing detached tasks without explicit approval
introducing or using @unchecked Sendable anywhere without explicit repository-owner approval for the exact change
using semaphores as the default test coordination strategy when async alternatives exist
